description.value:
A reliable two-handed crossbow balancing rate of fire and range. Sighted and steady, it suits disciplined marksmen who fire from prepared positions and punish enemies who try to close the distance.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Ranged d6 (80/320), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Ranged d8+3 (80/320), Reload reaction, Keen, Punch, Steady, Sighted
MasterTwo-Handed, Ranged d8+3 (80/320), Reload reaction, Keen, Punch, Steady, Sighted â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkAs a reaction, you may make an attack against a creature that enters or leaves a space within 10 ft of you.

rmeData.masterPerk: As a reaction, you may make an attack against a creature that enters or leaves a space within 10 ft of you.
